features.title: Seamless Business Management System
features.description: Sumu is an all-in-one business platform that seamlessly combines invoicing, accounting, taxes, analytics, and payments in a unified, easy-to-use system—built to simplify operations and accelerate the growth of small and medium businesses.

featuresV2.title: Empower your business with smart technologies tailored just for you.
featuresV2.description: In today's fast-paced business environment, staying organized and compliant with taxes shouldn't feel overwhelming. Sumu provides intuitive tools, real-time tracking, and intelligent insights designed for SMEs, freelancers, and entrepreneurs.
featuresV2.manageDescription: Full control over your business finances with integrated invoicing, automatic expense tracking, and real-time payment monitoring.
featuresV2.streamlinedDescription: Simplify tax management with automated VAT calculations, smart tax reporting, and bank account integrations. Sumu handles routine compliance tasks automatically while reducing manual work and minimizing errors—saving you hours every week and keeping you audit-ready at all times.
featuresV2.analyticsDescription: Get instant, detailed insights into your business performance with powerful dashboards and AI-powered analytics. Monitor key metrics like revenue, expenses, profit margins, and cash flow in real-time. Make data-driven decisions with confidence and identify growth opportunities before your competitors do.

featuresV3.title: Easily manage your business finances.
featuresV3.description: We provide you with the most advanced financial solutions that help you manage your money intelligently and efficiently, to achieve sustainable growth and long-term success for your business.
featuresV3.aiPowered: AI-powered insights for smarter business decisions.
featuresV3.scalabilitySecurity: Automatic VAT compliance and tax reporting.

faq.title: Commonly asked questions
faq.description: By offering concise and informative responses, this section helps users find solutions without the need to contact customer support, saving time
faq.question1: How do I create and send invoices on Sumu?
faq.answer1: Creating invoices on Sumu is simple and fast. Log in to your dashboard, go to the 'Invoices' section, and click 'Create New Invoice.' Fill in the required details, including client information, itemized products/services, quantities, and rates. Sumu automatically calculates taxes and totals. Once completed, you can send the invoice directly to your client via email or share a payment link. Your clients can pay immediately through integrated payment gateways or bank transfers.
faq.question2: How does Sumu handle VAT calculations and tax compliance?
faq.answer2: Sumu automates VAT calculations based on your jurisdiction's tax regulations. The system automatically classifies transactions, calculates the correct tax rate (typically 5-10% in GCC countries), and adds it to invoices. All tax data is recorded in real-time dashboards and consolidated into compliance-ready reports that you can download and submit to tax authorities. Sumu ensures 100% accuracy and keeps you audit-ready at all times.
faq.question3: Can I track my payments and cash flow in real-time?
faq.answer3: Yes! Sumu provides real-time dashboards that show your complete financial picture, including invoices sent, payments received, outstanding receivables, and expense tracking. By integrating with your bank account, Sumu automatically fetches transaction data and updates your cash flow status every minute. You can see which invoices are overdue, which payments are pending, and your current bank balance—all in one place.
faq.question4: Is my financial data secure on Sumu?
faq.answer4: Absolutely. Sumu uses enterprise-grade encryption (256-bit SSL) to protect all your data both in transit and at rest. We comply with international security standards (ISO 27001) and undergo regular third-party security audits. Your data is backed up automatically every hour and stored in secure, redundant cloud servers. We never share your financial information with third parties, and you maintain complete control over your data at all times.

overview.title: Built for how you work
overview.description: Solutions for small businesses, freelancers, accountants, and growing teams.

smallBusinesses.title: Small Businesses

freelancers.title: Freelancers & Consultants

accountants.title: Accountants & Bookkeepers

growingBusinesses.title: Growing Businesses
growingBusinesses.summary: Scale financial operations with visibility across revenue and profitability.

smallBusinesses.heading: Simplify Financial Management for Your Business
smallBusinesses.p1: Running a small business requires keeping track of invoices, payments, expenses, and financial records while focusing on daily operations. Sumu provides an integrated platform that helps small business owners manage their financial activities from one centralized dashboard.
smallBusinesses.p2: With Sumu, small businesses can create professional invoices, monitor incoming payments, record expenses, and generate financial reports without relying on multiple systems or complex accounting tools.
smallBusinesses.p3: By maintaining organized financial records and clear visibility into business performance, Sumu helps small businesses operate more efficiently and make better financial decisions.

oman.title: Built for Businesses in Oman
oman.p1: Sumu is designed to support businesses operating in Oman by enabling structured financial management aligned with local regulatory and tax requirements.
oman.p2: The platform helps businesses maintain organized financial records and generate reports that support compliance with the Oman Tax Authority requirements and local financial practices.

freelancers.heading: Professional Financial Tools for Independent Professionals
freelancers.p1: Freelancers and consultants often manage multiple clients, projects, and payments at the same time. Sumu provides a simple and reliable platform that helps independent professionals organize their financial activities and maintain professional billing processes.
freelancers.p2: With Sumu, freelancers can manage client information, issue invoices, track payments, and monitor income and expenses from one platform. This allows independent professionals to maintain clear financial records while focusing on delivering services to their clients.
freelancers.p3: Sumu helps freelancers maintain professional financial management without the complexity of traditional accounting systems, while maintaining clear financial control that supports growth.

benefits.b1: Manage client information and billing records
benefits.b2: Issue professional invoices and track payments
benefits.b5: Generate reports for financial tracking and tax preparation

accountants.heading: Structured Financial Records for Accounting Professionals
accountants.p1: Accounting professionals need reliable systems for structured records and accurate reporting. Sumu helps accountants and bookkeepers manage financial data efficiently.
accountants.p2: Maintain chart of accounts, record journal entries, track transactions, and generate reports — keeping records organized, transparent, and review-ready.
accountants.p3: Support your clients with accurate bookkeeping and clear financial oversight.

benefits.b1: Structured accounting records and financial data

growingBusinesses.heading: Scalable Financial Management for Expanding Companies
growingBusinesses.p1: As businesses grow, financial operations become more complex. Increasing transaction volumes, expanding client bases, and larger expense structures require more organized financial management systems.
growingBusinesses.p2: Sumu provides scalable financial tools that help growing companies maintain clear financial visibility while managing increasing operational complexity.
growingBusinesses.p3: By centralizing invoicing, payment tracking, expense management, accounting, and reporting, Sumu enables businesses to maintain structured financial records and support informed decision-making as the company expands.

benefits.b4: Generate financial reports for performance analysis

aboutSumu.heading: About Sumu
aboutSumu.title: Smart Financial Management for Modern Businesses
aboutSumu.p1: Sumu is the product brand of OceanGate for Smart Technologies LLC, an Omani technology company focused on developing innovative digital solutions for business and financial management.
aboutSumu.p2: Sumu brings invoicing, payment tracking, expense management, accounting, and financial reporting into one integrated system—helping businesses simplify financial operations and maintain structured records.
aboutSumu.storyText: Sumu was developed to solve a common challenge: managing financial operations using multiple disconnected tools. By bringing core workflows into one platform, businesses gain better visibility and operational control.
aboutSumu.builtForText: Designed to support modern businesses with structured financial tools that keep records clear, performance visible, and operations efficient.
aboutSumu.missionText: To simplify financial management with reliable, accessible, and easy-to-use digital tools.
aboutSumu.visionText: To become a trusted digital financial management platform across the region.
aboutSumu.valuesText: Integrity, Customer Focus, Simplicity, Continuous Improvement, Innovation, Empowerment.
aboutSumu.getStartedText: Start managing your business finances with a smarter and more organized platform.

intro.title: Terms & conditions
intro.p1: This site, sumu.com (hereafter referred to as Sumu, site, or website) is owned and operated by Sumu Technologies LLC (hereafter referred to as Sumu we, or company).
intro.p2: Please carefully read, review, and understand our Terms and Conditions before using any services or products from Sumu.com. Your access to and use of this website and its products indicate that you accept and agree to be bound by these terms and conditions.
intro.p3: If you do not agree with these terms, you should leave the site immediately and not use any of the materials or services available here.

liability.title: 1. Limitation of liability
liability.p1: Under no circumstances shall Sumu be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages, including but not limited to loss of data, profits, or business interruption, arising out of the use, or inability to use, the materials on this site, even if Sumu or an authorized representative has been advised of the possibility of such damages.
liability.p2: If your use of materials from this site results in the need for servicing, repair, or correction of equipment or data, you assume all associated costs.

license.title: 2. License
license.p1: Sumu services, platforms, and tools are provided under a commercial license agreement. Each subscription or license purchased includes access to updates and support for 365 days from the completion of the order.
license.p2: License activation is necessary to receive updates and premium support. You are not permitted to resell, redistribute, or offer Sumu products or services, modified or unmodified, without our written consent.

ownership.title: 3. Ownership and liability
ownership.p1: All Sumu products, solutions, and materials remain the intellectual property of Sumu Technologies LLC. You may not claim ownership of our services, whether modified or unmodified.
ownership.p2: Our products and services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind, expressed or implied. Sumu is not liable for any losses or damages resulting from the use or inability to use its products.
ownership.p3: User accounts and product licenses are
ownership.p3End: . For agencies and development partners: Please ensure your clients purchase their own licenses if they require direct support access.

refund.title: 4. Refund policy
refund.p1: We believe you'll love Sumu! Still, if you're not satisfied, we offer a 14-day no-questions-asked refund policy. Simply contact our support team within 14 days of your original purchase, and we'll issue a full refund. We might ask for feedback to help us improve, but you're under no obligation to share.
refund.link: Learn more about our refund policy

warranty.title: 5. Warranty
warranty.p1: Sumu services are provided without any warranty, either expressed or implied. We do not guarantee full compatibility with all browsers, devices, third-party plugins, or external systems. Before purchasing, you may review demos or contact our support team to verify compatibility with your setup.

termination.title: 6. Account termination and suspension
termination.p1: Sumu reserves the right to suspend or terminate any user account without prior notice for reasons including but not limited to
items: Abusive, defamatory, or malicious behavior towards Sumu staff or customers
Spreading false information or misleading reviews
Unauthorized resale, distribution, or promotion of competitor products
Involvement in hacking, spamming, piracy, or illegal activities
Security threats due to account compromise or unauthorized sharing

privacy.p2: By using Sumu services, you consent to the collection and use of your data by our Privacy Policy.

privacyPage.dataProtectionDesc: Sumu is a product operated by Sumu Technologies LLC. We specialize in property management solutions, empowering businesses worldwide to streamline their operations efficiently. We are committed to protecting your privacy and handling your information transparently.
privacyPage.policyIntroDesc: This Privacy Policy describes how your personal information is collected, used, and shared when you visit, subscribe, register, or make a purchase from https://Sumu.com (the "Site").

personalInfo.title: Personal information we collect
personalInfo.content: When you visit the Site, we automatically collect certain information about your device, including information about your web browser, IP address, time zone, and cookies installed on your device. Additionally, as you browse the Site, we collect information about the individual pages you view, what websites or search terms referred you to the Site, and how you interact with the Site. We call this automatically-collected information "Device Information."

deviceItems.title: Cookies
deviceItems.content: Data files placed on your device, often including an anonymous unique identifier. ( Learn more about cookies and how to disable them: http://www.allaboutcookies.org )

deviceItems.title: Log Files
deviceItems.content: Track actions on the Site and collect IP address, browser type, ISP, referring/exit pages, and timestamps.

deviceItems.title: Web Beacons, Tags, and Pixels
deviceItems.content: Electronic files to monitor site usage and interaction.

deviceItems.title: Google Analytics and Pixels
deviceItems.content: Collect traffic-related information and interaction behavior.

orderInfo.text: When you make or attempt to purchase through the Site, we collect information such as your name, email address, billing address, shipping address, payment details, and any other relevant data necessary to process your order.

fields.label: Payment information
fields.placeholder: credit card, PayPal, or bank details

useInfo.title: How we use your personal information
useInfo.orderDesc: We use the collected Order Information to:
orderItems: Process your orders, payments, and generate invoices
Screen for potential fraud or risks
Provide you with information or promotions related to our services, when aligned with your preferences
useInfo.deviceDesc: We use the collected Device Information to:
deviceItems: Improve and optimize the Site experience
Analyze customer interactions for performance tracking
Screen for potential risk and fraud

sharingInfo.title: Sharing your personal information
sharingInfo.desc: We share your Personal Information with trusted third-party service providers to help us operate effectively:
items: Google Analytics: To understand customer interactions and optimize experience (Learn more: Google Privacy Policy)

rights.title: Your rights
rights.desc: If you are a resident of the European Economic Area (EEA):
items: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information.
If you wish to exercise these rights, please contact us at support@nextsaas.com

simpleSections.title: Do not track
simpleSections.content: Please note, we do not alter our Site's data collection practices when we detect a "Do Not Track" signal from your browser.

simpleSections.title: Data retention
simpleSections.content: We will retain your Order Information for our records unless you ask us to delete this information.

simpleSections.title: Minors
simpleSections.content: Our Site is not intended for individuals under the age of 18.

simpleSections.title: Changes
simpleSections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically to reflect changes to our practices or for other operational, legal, or regulatory reasons.
